name: Queen of Pain
description: They say pain is all in the mind, but they're wrong: It's all in my hands.

abilities.name: Succubus
abilities.description: The closer the enemy units, the stronger the Akasha's spell lifesteal for herself is. Spell Lifesteal also works with Pure damage sourced to Akasha. Min Bonus Radius: 800. Proximity Radius: 150. Min Spell Lifesteal Bonus: 2%. Proximity Spell Lifesteal Bonus: 14%. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5. Spell Lifesteal Factor: 0.2.

abilities.name: Shadow Strike
abilities.description: Hurls a poisoned dagger that deals first damage to the unit-targeted enemy, then applies damage over time with a movement speed slow. The damage over time is inflicted again in fixed intervals after the first damage. Cast Range: 450/500/550/600. First Damage: 50/80/110/140. Move Speed Slow: 25%/35%/45%/55%. Duration: 16. Instance Interval: 3 (2). Damage per Instance: 20/40/60/80. Cooldown: 13/10/7/4. Mana Cost: 100/110/120/130.

abilities.name: Blink
abilities.description: Releases a sonic boom, deals damage and silences affected enemy units within the radius when Akasha blinks, at both her starting and ending locations. Cast Range: Global. Min Distance: 200. Max Distance: 1075/1150/1225/1300. Radius: (300). Damage: (125). Silence Duration: (1.75). Cooldown: 12/10/8/6. Mana Cost: 65.

abilities.name: Scream of Pain
abilities.description: The sultry voice of Akasha beckons her opponents while stealing their souls. Search Radius: 600. Damage: 90/175/260/345 (205/290/375/460). Cooldown: 7.5/7/6.5/6. Mana Cost: 120.

abilities.name: Sonic Wave
abilities.description: Creates a gigantic wave of sound in front of Akasha, dealing heavy damage to all enemy units in its wake and pushing them back. Cast Range: 700. First Radius: 100. Travel Distance: 900. End Radius: 450. Knock Distance: 350. Total Damage: 325/475/625 (575/725/875). Cooldown: 100/95/80. Mana Cost: 250/400/550.
